---
title = "R"
---

*Calepin* embeds R via [extendr](https://extendr.github.io/extendr/extendr_api/), running code directly in process. Variables, loaded packages, and state persist across chunks.

# Basic usage

```{r}
fit <- lm(mpg ~ wt + hp, data = mtcars)
summary(fit)$coefficients
```

# Inline expressions

The median horsepower is `{r} median(mtcars$hp)` and the dataset has `{r} nrow(mtcars)` observations. Numeric results are automatically formatted with 3 significant digits and comma separators.

# Plots

R plots are captured automatically. Use chunk options to control dimensions and format.

```{r}
#| fig-width: 6
#| fig-height: 4
plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg,
     xlab = "Weight", ylab = "MPG",
     main = "Fuel efficiency by weight",
     pch = 19, col = "steelblue")
```

# Warnings and messages

By default, warnings and messages are displayed. Suppress them with chunk options:

```{r}
#| warning: false
log(-1)
```
